# Mamascota

> Mamascota is an AI assistant that helps people caring for dogs and cats prepare for veterinary consultations through structured conversations and clear communication with veterinary professionals.

Mamascota does not diagnose diseases, prescribe medication or treatment, replace a veterinarian, or provide emergency veterinary services.

## Main pages

- [Mamascota](https://mamascota.com/): Start using Mamascota.
- [About Mamascota](https://mamascota.com/about): Purpose, consultation model, limitations, and frequently asked questions.
- [Mamascota Free](https://mamascota.com/free): Current free product capabilities.
- [Mamascota Plus](https://mamascota.com/plus): Continuity, saved consultations, and long-term organization.
- [Contact](https://mamascota.com/contact): Official contact information.
- [Support Mamascota](https://mamascota.com/paywall): Voluntary support for the independent project.

## Core capabilities

- Structured veterinary visit preparation
- Step-by-step organization of observations
- Reports for veterinary consultations
- Multilingual interface and report generation
- Navigation toward urgent professional care when warning signs are present

## Supported interface and report languages

English, Spanish, Russian, French, German, Italian, and Hebrew.

## Medical boundaries

Mamascota is a preparation and communication tool. It is not a diagnostic system, treatment service, telemedicine platform, or substitute for professional veterinary care.

## Canonical URL

https://mamascota.com/
